overall_scope: buffered-lane Atomicity and Durability only; all other lanes and properties remain Unverified

results.mechanism: table-buffer write-ahead redo log (.tbj) with an fsync'd atomic commit marker and idempotent recovery-on-open
results.expected: committed buffered transaction survives a crash; uncommitted leaves the DBF untouched
results.actual: COMMIT applied, ROLLBACK discarded, history retained (Phase A); crash-then-reopen replayed committed redo (Phase B)

results.mechanism: durable fsync'd .tbj redo log; commit marker synced before DBF apply; log removed only after apply
results.expected: committed buffered transaction is recoverable after a crash on reopen
results.actual: reopen replayed the committed redo (NAME=Recovered); buffered DELETE deferred/applied/discarded (Phase C)

still_unverified: buffered lane Consistency (CDX/LMDB reconciliation after commit)
direct MULTIREP, LMDB-local, DBF+LMDB, memo+DBF, and legacy lanes
note: Re-rating of the buffered x64 lane after the 2026-07-19 table-buffer WAL. Scoped gain, not a full-ACID claim; see acid_assessment_beta-1.md for the rating-gate evidence.
